applied_suggestions.note: TFL1 Multi-Output Scaffold now complete with 6 outputs (AP1, LFY, SOC1, FD, FUL, Flowering_Time). Pre-Edge check 4 (feedback): TFL1 -> FUL -> AP1 -| TFL1 closes a triple-hop positive loop; coherent with existing AP1<->TFL1 Motif-7 bistable switch, damped at 0.7.
FUL now has three canonical activators (FT, SPL9, SOC1). Motif 3 Coherent Feed-Forward on AP1 now has three parallel paths (SOC1 -> AP1 direct, SOC1 -> FUL -> AP1, SOC1 -> LFY -> AP1).
Closes Motif 7 mutual inhibition AP2 <-> miR172 (double-negative bistable switch stabilising the juvenile/adult phase boundary).

TPS1 now has two outputs (T6P, FT direct). FT activator count rises to 7 (at §10 hard cap — acceptable for central florigen hub). Motif 3 Coherent Feed-Forward on FT via TPS1 -> T6P -> FT and TPS1 -> FT direct captures tps1 hypomorph phenotypes beyond what T6P depletion alone predicts.

edges_removed.reason: Swapped per Judge S21 option (b): FUL still connects to the phenotype via FUL -> AP1 -> Flowering_Time cascade; removing the direct edge keeps phenotype activators at 4 while adding a new effector class.

applied_suggestions.note: Phenotype activators now {AP1, LFY, SOC1, FT} — four activators across two effector classes (meristem MADS-box TFs + mobile florigen). Inhibitor TFL1 preserved. Canonical FT -> Flowering_Time direct edge (E129 HIGH) is the single most-cited flowering mechanism in the literature.

applied_suggestions.reason: PIF4 -> GI (+1, E201 HIGH) would convert GI from source to non-source with single activator PIF4. Combined with existing GI -| PIF4 (E148) this creates a single-negative feedback loop (stabilising, not runaway). Deferred because GI as source is a load-bearing clock-simplification decision from iter 1 — promoting GI to non-source would cascade through CO/FKF1/CDF1/FT dynamics. If Step 5 REFINEMENT shows GI/PIF4 perturbation predictions failing, revisit then.

AUTONOMOUS composite restructure (collapsing FCA/FPA/FLD/FVE/LD). The FLC inhibitor hard-cap is only a constraint because we want to add Vernalization direct and VRN1. Both were rejected in iter 2 as redundant with VIN3-cascade. Composite would lose fca/fve/fld/ld single-mutant resolution — a substantial cost. Deferred indefinitely unless a specific perturbation failure in Step 5 requires the additional FLC inhibitors.
